steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: Prospero's closing statement is the pivot: “If thou remember'st aught ere thou camest here, / How thou camest here thou mayst.” He's making a conditional inference—because Miranda has successfully retrieved a memory from before arriving (the attendants), she may be capable of retrieving memories about the arrival itself.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Prospero directly claims that Miranda's ability to summon details of her pre-island experience (the women who tended her) logically suggests she may also be able to summon details of her arrival on the island.

The other choices either contradict Prospero's validation of her memory, misread her emotional state or invent reluctance not shown in the text. D captures the precise inference Prospero draws from her demonstrated recollection.

That confirms D is correct.
